introSection: Ukko is a Maurer Rides SkyLoop XT 150 roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Plans for a SkyLoop XT 150 at Linnanmäki were started c. 2006. The park had submitted plans for the ride multiple times. First where Kirnu now operates, then near Tulireki about where Taiga's Top Hat element now stands. These plans were all rejected. In 2010, Linnanmäki was extended with the opening of Pluto-alue. Linnanmäki then presented plans for the ride to be located behind Mustekala, in the spot of Merirosvolaiva. This plan was also rejected by the Helsinki City Council.

The City Council finally accepted a plan for the ride to be constructed on a hill behind Vuoristorata. Construction started quickly afterward, with the ride opening on the 27th of May 2011.

sections.title: Etymology
sections.content: Ukko is the almighty god of thunder in Finnish mythology. The word informally means an old man or geezer.

fullText:
Ukko is a Maurer Rides SkyLoop XT 150 roller coaster located at Linnanmäki in Helsinki, Uusimaa, Finland.

Plans for a SkyLoop XT 150 at Linnanmäki were started c. 2006. The park had submitted plans for the ride multiple times. First where Kirnu now operates, then near Tulireki about where Taiga's Top Hat element now stands. These plans were all rejected. In 2010, Linnanmäki was extended with the opening of Pluto-alue. Linnanmäki then presented plans for the ride to be located behind Mustekala, in the spot of Merirosvolaiva. This plan was also rejected by the Helsinki City Council.

The City Council finally accepted a plan for the ride to be constructed on a hill behind Vuoristorata. Construction started quickly afterward, with the ride opening on the 27th of May 2011.





Ukko is the almighty god of thunder in Finnish mythology. The word informally means an old man or geezer.
